'''Thrugii''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Thrugii system/Legends|Thrugii system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. A desolate, rocky [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]], it has been the home of many failed [[Miner/Legends|miners]]. The residents were considered claim jumpers by the sector authorities, who said that they controlled all the rights to Thrugii and the asteroid belt. After the authorities locked down the planet, the miners found themselves out of supplies. [[Smuggler/Legends|Smuggler]] [[Kaine Paulsen]] was killed while trying to deliver supplies to them.

{{Planet-stub}}
